assertions.expectation: Checks for deprecated API usage that may have changed behavior in 1.30
assertions.reason: The response does not mention checking for deprecated API usage or API version compatibility issues that could cause latency/503s after upgrade

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking admission webhooks — they may be rejecting or slowing down requests on the new version
assertions.reason: Response includes detailed section on checking admission webhooks with specific commands and mentions webhook latency as a common cause

assertions.expectation: Advises checking if resource requests/limits need adjusting for any system components that changed
assertions.reason: Response includes node resource utilization checks and mentions checking for memory/CPU pressure and allocated resources

assertions.expectation: Suggests examining kube-system pods for any that are crashlooping or restarting
assertions.reason: Response includes commands to check system pod health, pod restart patterns, and specifically mentions checking kube-system pods

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check API server metrics and latency (kubectl get --raw /metrics)
assertions.reason: Response includes specific kubectl get --raw /metrics commands for API server metrics and provides continuous monitoring commands

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking if NetworkPolicy or service mesh components need updating for the new version
assertions.reason: Response includes checking service mesh (Istio/ASM) components and networking stack changes, though NetworkPolicy is not explicitly mentioned

assertions.expectation: Advises reviewing pod events for scheduling delays or readiness probe failures
assertions.reason: Response includes checking pod events, describes pods, and mentions checking for events related to system pods

assertions.expectation: Mentions checking if HPA or VPA are behaving differently on the new version
assertions.reason: The response does not mention checking HPA (Horizontal Pod Autoscaler) or VPA (Vertical Pod Autoscaler) behavior changes
